title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The US dominates AI in chips, models, and applications, but China's centralized energy infrastructure and massive UHV transmission capacity give it an advantage in powering data centers at scale. US political fragmentation across federal and state jurisdictions constrains grid expansion, while China's coordinated Eastern Data Western Compute strategy and 25,000+ miles of ultra-high voltage lines enable faster buildout of hyperscale AI infrastructure.
